selections.name: One Step Beyond
selections.reason: Benefits massively from a projected pace meltdown with 5 'Early' types signed on. His stalking style and 97 base speed figure make him the prime beneficiary.

selections.name: My Balboa
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly on the rail, which is a massive advantage on the tight MNR turf course. Should get a ground-saving trip behind the speed duel.

selections.name: Cascabel
selections.reason: Possesses a field-high 100 raw speed figure, but takes a slight penalty due to the heavy early pace pressure expected. Still a major threat if he clears.

selections.name: This Is The Life
selections.reason: Classy shipper with a 91 class rating, but draws a tough outside post on a turf course that heavily penalizes wide trips.

danger_horse.name: Lil Red Beaudette
danger_horse.reason: Has early speed and an inside draw, could hang around for exotics if the pace isn't as suicidal as projected.

selections.name: Bustin Loose
selections.reason: With scratches removing key contenders, this race is loaded with cheap speed that triggers the Class Disparity Cap. As a presser, he gets a +5 pace bonus.

selections.name: Mo Caliente
selections.reason: Raw 104 speed figure is capped due to a lower class rating (83). Takes a pace penalty but still holds a class edge over the remaining field.

selections.name: Kool Kathmandu
selections.reason: Another speed type whose raw figures are capped by class disparity. Drawn well enough to contend for a piece.

selections.name: Vroysky
selections.reason: Gets the coveted rail draw on the turf. His 104 raw speed is heavily capped by a 77 class rating, but the post position keeps him viable.

danger_horse.name: Parade Of Fears
danger_horse.reason: Outside draw is a severe penalty here, but has enough tactical speed to cross over if aggressively ridden.

selections.name: El Kozan
selections.reason: Pace meltdown scenario with three 'E' types. His pressing style earns a +5 bonus, upgrading his capped speed figure perfectly for this setup.

selections.name: Shore Time
selections.reason: Consistent early speed type. Takes a -4 penalty for the contested pace, but his base class keeps him right in the mix.

selections.name: Prime Shopping
selections.reason: Stalker drawn inside who will benefit from the pace duel. Upgraded +5 points for the favorable race flow.

selections.name: Cometothedarkside
selections.reason: Early speed horse that will be part of the pace pressure. Needs to survive the duel to hit the board.

danger_horse.name: High Spark
danger_horse.reason: Speed figures are capped by class, but could inherit the lead if the inside speed horses falter.

selections.name: Miss Fussy Pants
selections.reason: In a 4.5f dash loaded with four 'E' types, her pressing style is gold. Gets a +5 pace upgrade as the speed collapses.

selections.name: Palmary
selections.reason: Sustained closer who will be flying late. The 3+ 'E' horse meltdown scenario gives her a massive +5 advantage.

selections.name: Glory Hallelujah
selections.reason: Highest raw speed (99) and class (84) in the field. Takes a -4 penalty for the pace duel, but is too talented to ignore.

selections.name: Little Bit Of That
selections.reason: Classy 90 rating, but will be caught in the early speed crossfire. Downgraded slightly but remains a factor.

danger_horse.name: Mornin' Boss
danger_horse.reason: Outside draw in a sprint is tough, but has the raw speed to contend if she can clear early.

selections.name: Best Virginia
selections.reason: Lone 'E' speed in a route race. Gets a massive +5 tactical advantage and should control the fractions from the rail.

selections.name: Vintage Sparkle
selections.reason: Solid presser with an 84 class rating. Will get first run at the lone speed if the pace slows down.

selections.name: Tiergarten
selections.reason: Raw 100 speed is capped by a 76 class rating, filtering out cheap speed. Still a strong contender for the exotics.

selections.name: Princessofthenorth
selections.reason: Consistent presser who should secure a good stalking position despite the outside draw.

danger_horse.name: Summersattheshore
danger_horse.reason: Has tactical speed and draws well, could hit the board at a price.

selections.name: Train And Trust
selections.reason: Pace meltdown projected with three 'E' types. This presser gets a +5 upgrade and has a strong 85 class rating to back it up.

selections.name: Moralito
selections.reason: Another presser who benefits from the contested pace. Base 91 speed is upgraded +5 for the favorable setup.

selections.name: Candy Street
selections.reason: Raw 101 speed is capped by class (80), but still receives the +5 pace bonus as a stalker.

selections.name: Gemstone Warrior
selections.reason: Raw 100 speed capped by 81 class. Takes a -4 penalty for being part of the projected speed duel.

danger_horse.name: Wings Of God
danger_horse.reason: Early speed type who could be dangerous if he manages to shake loose from the other front-runners.

selections.name: Out Of Cents
selections.reason: The only true presser in a 4-horse field where the other 3 are 'E' types. Gets a +5 pace bonus as they duel each other into submission.

selections.name: Little Roo Roo
selections.reason: Highest raw speed (98) and class (95). Takes a -4 pace penalty but is simply better than the remaining speed horses.

selections.name: Nocashrefunds
selections.reason: Classy 97 rating but will be forced to duel from the rail. Takes a -4 pace penalty.

selections.name: Abundant Energy
selections.reason: Will be caught in the speed crossfire. Downgraded -4 points.

selections.name: Don't Cross Jack
selections.reason: Massive pace meltdown projected with 7 'E' types signed on. This presser gets a +5 bonus and a dream setup.

selections.name: Classic Mo
selections.reason: Highest class (87) and raw speed (98) of the early types. Takes a -4 penalty but is talented enough to hold on for a share.

selections.name: Koselio
selections.reason: Another presser who will benefit from the suicidal early fractions. Speed is capped by class but gets the +5 pace upgrade.

selections.name: Osprey
selections.reason: Speed is capped by class disparity. Outside draw on turf is a negative, but has the raw numbers to hit the superfecta.

danger_horse.name: Remys Gunsmoke
danger_horse.reason: Drawn on the rail, which is huge here, but will be under immense pressure from the outside speed.
